Items.Title: Build It Plugin Core
Items.Description: Core module for Build It Plugin What’s New: • Dialogue Editor v1.0.1: added gesture property, improved UI & UX • (New) object Utility > NPC_v2: NPC object with dialogue integration • Dialogue module optimised for 2D & 3D Worlds • Screenshot module: dynamic quality and performance optimization • System & Performance updates

Themes.Title: Tutorials
Themes.Name: buildit.tutorials
Themes.Description: In-editor tutorials for Build It Plugin • Master the essentials of Unity quickly • Explore the various Build It assets we provide • Learn how to test and refine your world • Step-by-step guide to publishing your first world • Guided interactive walkthroughs • Multi-language support: English, Korean, Japanese, Chinese, French, Indonesian, Thai, Turkish

Themes.Title: 2D World
Themes.Name: asset.2dworld
Themes.Description: 2D World module for Build It Plugin • Prepared for quick creation of 2D worlds • Custom Loading Screen: Easy UI setup for transitions. • Instant Map Creation: Transform any image into a 2D world space. • BGM Control: Background music management. • Map Portals: Instant teleportation between maps. • Map Expander: Effortless addition of new map areas. • Dialogue NPCs: Interactive NPCs with talk functions. (Zepeto NPC/Sprite NPC) What’s New: • ZepetoNPC optimized for gesture animation • Updated to take advantage of dialogue's gestures Important: When updating your 2D World, you need to re-export the existing dialogues

Themes.Title: Vehicle
Themes.Name: asset.vehicle
Themes.Description:
Vehicle Theme

We’ve added a complete set of 24 vehicles designed to work seamlessly with the new driving system. They’re ready to drop straight into your project so you can start creating right away!
